description_long: This object is a rectangular blister pack containing ten round, dome-shaped tablets arranged in two parallel rows of five. The pack is made of a semi-transparent plastic material, allowing the contours of each tablet to be visible through the surface. Each tablet is individually sealed within its own compartment, separated by thin plastic dividers. The overall color is a muted gray, with a slightly glossy finish that reflects light. There are no visible labels, text, or branding on the surface. The pack is compact and lightweight, designed for easy transport and dispensing of individual doses.
description: A gray, semi-transparent blister pack with ten round tablets in two rows, each sealed in its own compartment. The pack has a glossy finish and no visible labeling.
description_view_0: The pack is viewed from the short end, showing the two rows of five round tablets aligned lengthwise.
description_view_1: The pack is seen from the long side, clearly displaying all ten tablets in two parallel rows.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the short end is visible with the arrangement of tablets in two rows.
description_view_3: The long side is shown again, with all ten tablets visible in their compartments.
